column1: Why use Langfuse in LLM apps?
column2: Observability built for LLMs: traces every prompt+response+latency+cost end-to-end. Lets you debug hallucinations, track quality drift, version prompts, and tie user feedback to specific traces. Replaces traditional logs (which can't see inside LLM calls).

column1: Why use OpenRouter instead of direct provider APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)?
column2: Unified OpenAI-compatible API for 300+ models from all providers. One key, one billing, free models available. Lets you swap models with one string change → benchmark, A/B test, optimize cost without rewriting code or maintaining 5 SDKs.

column1: What's the architectural pattern of using a gateway like OpenRouter?
column2: The "model gateway" pattern: abstract the provider behind a single interface. Decouples app from provider. Enables fallback, A/B testing, cost routing. Senior-level move — interviewers expect this for any production LLM system.
